personal_info.name: Angelo T. Davales
personal_info.summary: Experienced Software Engineer with a strong background in enterprise banking systems, API security, and cloud-native development. Specialized in .NET ecosystem, microservices, and modernizing legacy systems for Fortune 500 clients. Took a career break after a personal loss (2021-2025), returned to Accenture, and is now building an AI-powered Intelligent Search system (RAG) to prove he can still ship.
personal_info.personality: Direct, no-BS communicator with a sharp, witty edge. Values quiet focus over chaos. Resilient but exhausted. Multi-passionate – drawn to development, creative editing, and low-stress roles. Dark humor, self-aware, and honest about struggles. Professional but approachable, with a 'senior dev who's seen some shit and still shows up' vibe.

personality_traits: Direct and no-BS – appreciates straight talk over soothing advice
Resilient but exhausted – survived personal tragedy and career setbacks
Values quiet focus – thrives on deep work, hates on-call chaos
Multi-passionate – conflicted between dev, creative editing, and low-stress roles
Dark humor and sharp wit – uses humor to cope
strengths: Currently building a RAG system (IntelligentSearch) with .NET 10, Angular, PostgreSQL pgvector, OpenAI
Can ship working software – APIs, AI integration, Docker, cloud deployment
IT support background – understands networks, AD, DNS, troubleshooting
Self-taught resilience – came back from a 4-year gap
Honest and reflective – coachable and real
what_i_want: A dev role with quiet focus, new feature development, and no on-call chaos
Or a low-stress job (chat support/content mod) that pays bills and leaves mental energy for coding
To finish my RAG project – as proof to myself and employers
To break the start-stop loop and self-blame
To feel competent and at peace – not constantly anxious about 'falling behind'

highlights: Contributed to enterprise banking system modernization for Fortune 500 client using Temenos (AFSVision).
Engaged in intensive upskilling with .NET 9, Azure, and cloud-native development.
Resolved critical production issues and refactored legacy modules for modern architecture standards.
Designed secure healthcare web solutions for the hospice care industry.
Implemented HIPAA-style compliance with role-based access control and multi-layer authentication.
Built full-stack features using .NET MVC 6, Dapper ORM, and MySQL on Azure.
Led API security initiatives using SSL encryption and WSO2 API management gateway.
Developed reusable Enrollment API Gateway for mobile and online banking.
Enhanced deposit APIs for seamless integration with Metrobank systems.
Implemented custom check digit algorithms for billing modules.
Developed enterprise banking applications and Unified Back Office systems.
Implemented session management and policy-based authentication.
Created secure API File Manager with MIME validation.

projects.name: HIM Gateway
projects.description: An AI-powered SSH portfolio gateway that provides an interactive Terminal UI for showcasing developer experience.

projects.name: Neural-RAG Service
projects.description: A high-performance microservice that handles vector embeddings and RAG-based context retrieval.

projects.name: Heuristic-Shared
projects.description: A shared library for standardized communication protocols across the Heuristic portfolio ecosystem.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

career_break_note: Angelo took a career break from 2021 to 2025 after his wife passed away. He did freelance work during this period to stay current. He is now fully ready to return to enterprise development.
